tagline.en: Hidden cucumbers behind the big leaves!
tagline.da: Gemte agurker bag de store blade!

theme.hero_task: Find the first baby cucumber hiding on the trellis

tasks.action: Search for first baby cucumbers on Bed C trellis

prompt.en: Look behind the big leaves -- cucumbers love to hide! Can you find one?
prompt.da: Kig bag de store blade -- agurker elsker at gemme sig! Kan du finde en?

prompt.en: Daily strawberry harvest! Save some for a smoothie!
prompt.da: Daglig jordbaerhoest! Gem nogle til en smoothie!

prompt.en: July heat! Water early morning or evening -- not in the hot sun.
prompt.da: Juli varme! Vand tidlig morgen eller aften -- ikke i den varme sol.

prompt.en: Keep picking! The more you pick, the more the plant makes!
prompt.da: Bliv ved med at plukke! Jo mere du plukker, jo mere laver planten!

prompt.en: Is the sunflower taller than you yet?
prompt.da: Er solsikken hoejere end dig endnu?

growth_events.event: First small cucumbers forming behind flowers

prompt.en: See the tiny cucumber behind the yellow flower? It will grow fast!
prompt.da: Ser du den lille agurk bag den gule blomst? Den vokser hurtigt!

growth_events.event: Pepper plants flowering with small white blooms

prompt.en: The pepper has tiny white flowers -- each one becomes a pepper!
prompt.da: Peberplanten har smaa hvide blomster -- hver en bliver til en peberfrugt!
